# Zero Trust Packet Routing

Manage OCI Zero Trust Packet Routing policies from Kubernetes with a reviewed work-request-backed runtime.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `zpr` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-zpr-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-zpr:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-zpr-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to ZprPolicy while Configuration and policy work-request helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime uses service-SDK work requests for create, update, and delete, binds only on exact `compartmentId` plus immutable `name`, and limits in-place updates to description, statements, and tags.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
